executive_summary: Build failure analysis for scib_demo repository on main branch (Attempt 3). Critical configuration error detected: GitHub Actions workflow file not found at expected path .github/workflows/build.yml. This prevents any build execution from occurring. The workflow dispatch API returned HTTP 404, indicating the workflow file is either missing, incorrectly named, or not accessible with current permissions. Total errors: 1 critical configuration error.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found when attempting to trigger the build workflow. The workflow file at path .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist or is not accessible in the repository.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml is missing from the repository at the specified branch (main). This could be due to: (1) Workflow file never created, (2) Workflow file deleted or moved, (3) Incorrect file path or naming, (4) Branch does not contain the workflow file, or (5) GitHub Actions disabled for the repository.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or restored. This blocks all CI/CD automation, preventing code compilation, testing, and deployment. Development team cannot validate code changes through automated builds.

steps: 2. Create build.yml workflow file with Maven build configuration
4. Set up Java environment and Maven build steps
5. Commit workflow file to main branch
6. Verify workflow appears in GitHub Actions tab
7. Test workflow dispatch to confirm accessibility
recommended_fix.sample_workflow_content:
name: Maven Build

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v3
        with:
          java-version: '11'
          distribution: 'temurin'
      - name: Build with Maven
        run: mvn clean install
      - name: Run tests
        run: mvn test
recommended_fix.verification: After creating workflow file, trigger manual workflow dispatch and verify HTTP 200 response

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Configuration error detected in build attempt 3. Workflow file missing prevents compliance validation of build artifacts. Requires immediate remediation to restore CI/CD pipeline.
compliance_notes.security_impact: Missing workflow file prevents automated security scanning and vulnerability detection in build pipeline. Manual code review required until automated builds restored.
compliance_notes.regulatory_compliance: Build automation failure may impact compliance requirements for change management and deployment validation. Document manual verification procedures until automated pipeline restored.

metadata.github_api_call_reason: No valid action_url available - workflow dispatch failed before run creation

immediate_actions: Create .github/workflows/build.yml file with Maven build configuration
Verify GitHub Actions is enabled for the repository
Confirm GitHub token has workflow write permissions
Test workflow dispatch endpoint after file creation
preventive_measures: Implement workflow file validation in pre-commit hooks
Add workflow file existence check to repository health monitoring
Document workflow file structure and requirements
Set up alerts for workflow file modifications or deletions
Maintain workflow file templates in organization-level repository
monitoring: Monitor GitHub Actions workflow dispatch API responses
Track workflow file changes through Git history
Set up automated tests for workflow file syntax validation

next_steps.priority_1: Create missing workflow file to restore build pipeline
next_steps.priority_2: Verify GitHub Actions permissions and repository settings
next_steps.priority_3: Test workflow execution with sample build
next_steps.priority_4: Document workflow configuration for team reference
next_steps.priority_5: Implement monitoring to prevent future workflow file issues
